title: A Climate Chatbot for Trusted and Transparent Climate Information
content:
Introducing CABot, a chatbot that makes climate knowledge more accessible to everyone, keeping information clear, factual, and credible.

The post A Climate Chatbot for Trusted and Transparent Climate Information first appeared on Open Knowledge Blog.
snippet: Introducing CABot, a chatbot that makes climate knowledge more accessible to everyone, keeping information clear, factual, and credible.
creator: Aleena Harold Peter and Renu Kumari
sourceDescription: Content for a fair, sustainable and open future
